title: The Magnificent Cuckold
writer: Fernand Crommelynck, Diego Fabbri, Ruggero Maccari
actors: Claudia Cardinale, Ugo Tognazzi, Bernard Blier
plot: Andrea Artusi begins to have doubts about the loyalty of his beautiful wife. When doubt becomes an obsession, his behavior becomes completely crazy, stalking her relentlessly.
